subcodes.title: Words to Mary Lucas and other pilgrims, spoken on 1905-02-04
subcodes.first_line: ...there are five kinds of love: 1st: The love of His own perfections which caused God to create
subcodes.subjects: @four; five pathways of love, @soul; spirit after death, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @realms of being; three realms; five realms
